findings.description: Critical: live SSE updates are filtered out because `sse_event_generator` drops every task/audit event whose `CoordinatorEvent.change_id` is missing, but the database NOTIFY payload built by `coordinator_notify()` does not include `change_id`. Real `coordinator_task` and `coordinator_audit` trigger events therefore never reach the client; the board only gets the initial snapshot/polling path. Fix by including a change-id in emitted payloads, deriving it before filtering, or changing the filter to look up the issue/audit row before deciding suppression.

Critical: vendor swimlanes do not display the required latest `audit_log.args_summary` activity per vendor. `agentsByIssueId` only projects `agent_id` plus worktree heartbeat, and `VendorSwimlanes` renders only vendor and relative time. The polling fallback also never calls `GET /audit`, so swimlanes cannot show audit activity when SSE is unavailable. Fix by maintaining per-agent latest audit activity from SSE and `/audit?since=&change_id=&limit=`, threading `args_summary` into `AgentActivity`, and rendering the one-line summary per lane.

Critical: the Done column is bucketed from `failed` as well as `completed`, and the 24-hour filter uses `updated_at ?? created_at` instead of `completed_at`. The spec requires Done to contain only `status = completed` rows where `completed_at` is within the last 24 hours, so recently completed old tasks can be hidden and failed tasks can appear as done. Fix the `Issue` type to include `completed_at`, map only `completed` to Done, and filter on `completed_at`.

Critical: destructive kick audit events are not persisted to `docs/kanban-viz/audit/...` and the emitted payload shape does not match `audit-event.json`. `SyncPointBanner` only calls an optional `onAuditEmit`, `App` does not provide one, and the emitted values include actions/outcomes like `kick-agent-initiated`, `pending`, `success`, `failure`, and `cancelled` that are outside the schema enum. Declines therefore produce no durable audit artifact. Fix by wiring `onAuditEmit` to `POST /kanban-viz/audit` and emitting schema-valid `action`, `class`, and `outcome` values for confirm, decline, and failure paths.

Critical: each SSE connection registers callbacks on the singleton `EventBusService` but never unregisters them when the client disconnects. Closed connections leave callback closures and queues behind; future events continue enqueueing into abandoned queues until they fill, after which event-bus callback tasks can hang and accumulate. Fix by adding an unsubscribe API to `EventBusService` or by registering connection-scoped callbacks in a context manager and removing them in the generator `finally` block.

Critical: coordinator-owned file-write helpers persist arbitrary saved-view and audit payloads without validating them against the checked-in JSON schemas, despite the contract requiring write-time validation. This can commit invalid canonical artifacts under `docs/kanban-viz/`. Fix by validating `view_payload` and `event_payload` against `contracts/schemas/saved-view.json` and `contracts/schemas/audit-event.json` after server-side header stamping and before atomic write, returning 400 on validation errors.
